case_title: HUJAZI, MONICA vs. MENDIOLA, MARVIN et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUJAZI, MONICA AS TO DEFENDANT MENDIOLA, MARVIN NUNEZ, UBERNE SMITH, SONIA
DECLARATION RE: LOST LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUJAZI, MONICA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUJAZI, MONICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDIOLA, MARVIN NUNEZ, UBERNE SMITH, SONIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3009 MISSION ST #103, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.
